text.title: Multi-Burn-Rate SLO Recipe Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply multi-burn-rate-slo-recipe. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Pin SLO + window
step.description: Input: SLO doc. Action: Extract numeric target + error budget window.. Output: Pinned SLO..

step.name: Derive thresholds
step.description: Input: Pinned SLO. Action: Compute fast/slow burn-rate values.. Output: Threshold table..

step.name: Encode alerts
step.description: Input: Threshold table + platform DSL. Action: Author Prom rules / Datadog monitor.. Output: Alert config..
step.note: Step 3. Required input: Threshold table + platform DSL.

step.name: Link runbook
step.description: Input: Alert config. Action: Attach runbook URL; verify reachable.. Output: Runbook-linked alert..

step.name: Dry-run + tune
step.description: Input: Runbook-linked alert. Action: Observe-only ≥1 week; tune thresholds.. Output: Live alert..
